title: digital marketer
description:
Job Title

Digital Marketer (Full-Time)

Location

Singapore

About the Role

We’re looking for a Digital Marketer who understands how people discover, engage, and convert online — especially in a fast-moving Singapore market.

You’ll be involved in planning, executing, and optimising digital campaigns across social media, search, and paid platforms. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both creative thinking and data, and wants to see real results from their work.

If you like testing ideas, analysing performance, and growing brands online, this role gives you space to learn, experiment, and grow.

What You’ll Do (Your Impact)

Digital Marketing & Campaigns

  • Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across social media, Google, and digital platforms

  • Manage content calendars in collaboration with design and content teams

  • Support paid ads (Meta, Google Ads) setup, monitoring, and optimisation

  • Assist with lead generation and customer acquisition efforts

Performance & Analytics

  • Track and analyse campaign performance (reach, engagement, leads, conversions)

  • Prepare simple performance reports and insights

  • Optimise campaigns based on data and results

  • Support A/B testing of creatives, captions, and audiences

Content & Brand Support

  • Work with designers and content creators on marketing materials

  • Ensure messaging aligns with brand tone and objectives

  • Support promotions, launches, and marketing initiatives

  • Keep up with local digital trends and platform updates

Who This Role Is Great For

  • Digital Marketing / Marketing Communications graduates

  • Fresh grads or early-career marketers who want hands-on experience

  • People who enjoy both creativity and analytics

  • Marketers who want to see real impact, not just theory

What We’re Looking For

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Digital Media, or related field

  • Fresh graduates welcome (experience is a bonus, not a must)

  • Basic understanding of social media platforms and digital ads

  • Comfortable with analytics tools (Meta insights, Google Analytics – training provided)

  • Organised, curious, and willing to learn

  • Good communication and collaboration skills

What You Can Achieve With Us

By growing with us, you can:

  • Gain hands-on experience in digital campaigns and paid ads

  • Learn how digital marketing drives leads and business growth

  • Build strong skills in performance tracking and optimisation

  • Grow into roles such as:

    • Senior Digital Marketer,

    • Performance Marketing Specialist, or

    • Marketing / Brand Lead

  • Be part of a team that values ideas, initiative, and results

Why Join Us

  • Full-time, stable role in a growing company

  • Real campaign ownership and learning opportunities

  • Supportive team environment (not agency burnout culture)

  • Clear career progression

  • Salary commensurate with experience

  • Leave and benefits according to MOM guidelines

Working Hours

  • Monday to Friday, office hours

postedCompany.description:
About the Contractor Kaki

The Contractor Kaki Group is an integrated practice spanning design, carpentry, and construction, delivering projects with clarity and accountability from concept to completion.

Led by Kiren Pak, whose background in Product Design, Interior & Landscape Design, and Facility Management bridges creativity with technical rigour, the group is built on a deep understanding of materials, buildability, and execution.

The group comprises three complementary entities:

  • Contractor Kaki (Direct SG Contractor Pte Ltd) — a BCA-registered contractor focused on engineering discipline, quality workmanship, and robust technical processes

  • Interior Kaki — a design-led interior practice with in-house carpentry and showroom, creating spaces that reflect the homeowner’s lifestyle and identity

  • Builder Kaki — a BCA Class 2 licensed builder, strengthening the group’s capability in larger-scale and complex building works

By integrating design, carpentry, and construction under one umbrella, the Contractor Kaki Group ensures design intent is respected, execution is disciplined, and quality is consistent across every project.

We build with purpose — combining design integrity, technical excellence, and long-term performance.
The beauty of the design and the engineering that creates funtional yet athestic masterpiece for the end user. We also focus on our Quality Work and our Techincal Work Process to work towards good worksmanship.  We are always taking in feedback from Clients so that we can keep on improving our work process and our techincal skill. Whichever space we design we design for Human and not the space! We loves to work with creative mind or anyone whom is interested to learn regardless of race, age or even sexes. At Contractor Kaki- we loves to share our skills and knowledge to those whom want to build this trade as there main career. At here- you can learn and grow and master whatever you want. Come join us!
postedCompany.name: CONTRACTOR KAKI PTE. LTD.
